title: stephanochilus omphalodes
intro: Stephanochilus omphalodes, also known as the "belly button plant," is a type of medicinal plant that belongs to the family of flowering plants. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Stephanochilus omphalodes is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
